title: Check SSH Users on Mittwald
description: Check SSH user configuration on Mittwald hosting project.
prompt: I need to check the SSH access configuration on my Mittwald project. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to list my projects and show all SSH users configured for access.

I need to set up SSH access to my project so I can deploy code and manage files. Can you help me create an SSH user and configure access? Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.

questionAnswers.answer: I'll add my public key manually later
